data.title: TRX price may hit $0.35 by May 2026, as TRON remains strong at $0.32 with bullish pattern formation and multi-year support.
data.description: TRON is demonstrating strong technical indicators at a value of $0.32, showcasing a bullish pattern formation. Analysts predict that TRX could reach $0.35 if it successfully breaks through the current resistance level. This optimistic forecast is backed by the extensive foundation that TRON has been establishing over the past few years.

data.title: Analyst predicts Bitcoin ETFs to surpass gold ETFs, citing broader appeal for investors in diversified portfolios.
data.description: ETF analyst James Seyffart suggests that Bitcoin ETFs provide more diverse investment opportunities for the average investor's portfolio compared to gold ETFs.

data.title: After "Becoming Chinese," they realized there's so much more to discover
data.description: In a recent report from China, the buzz about embracing Chinese culture has gained momentum on social media platforms. The trend focuses on adopting practices such as consuming hot water, particularly as the first drink of the day, and incorporating specific habits into daily routines. This wave of "becoming Chinese" highlights the growing interest in Chinese customs and lifestyle choices among a wider audience. The report emphasizes the significance of integrating these cultural elements into one's life for a more authentic experience. This trend underscores the increasing influence of Chinese traditions on global audiences, with discussions and recommendations spreading rapidly online.

data.title: Foundation for a Drug-Free World Volunteers Reach Athletes and Communities Across Italy During 2026 Winter Olympics
data.description: In Milan, Italy, on April 3, 2026, over 600 volunteers from the Foundation for a Drug-Free World embarked on a mission during the 2026 Winter Olympics and Paralympics in Milano and Cortina. They traveled throughout Italy to spread awareness about the dangers of drug use to athletes, tourists, and locals.

data.title: IBRX INVESTOR ALERT: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sued After FDA Flags Misleading Cancer Claims, Shares Plunge 21%, $2B Market Cap Lost -- Hagens Berman
data.description: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against ImmunityBio, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) as it is accused of fraudulent behavior by failing to disclose crucial information to investors. The lawsuit aims to cover those who bought ImmunityBio securities from January 19, 2026 to March 24, 2026. This legal action comes on the heels of revelations concerning undisclosed data impacting the company's share price.
